## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Related Issues

- Closes #
- Related to #

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Accessibility improvement
- [ ] Build/packaging update

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run compile`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] Manual extension-host verification (F5)
- [ ] Packaged successfully with `npm run package` (when release-impacting)

## Accessibility Checklist

- [ ] No conflicts with core VS Code shortcuts
- [ ] UI labels/tooltips/accessibility text updated where needed
- [ ] Keyboard flows verified for changed features
- [ ] Output and error states remain clear for screen reader users

## Documentation Checklist

- [ ] README updated for user-facing behavior/shortcut changes
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated for release-relevant changes
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING/STYLE guidance followed

## Screenshots / Logs (if useful)

Add screenshots, output snippets, or short notes demonstrating the change.

## Additional Notes

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
